title: lasianthus malaiensis
intro: Lasianthus malaiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the tea family, which is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lasianthus malaiensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus malaiensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and medicinal oils.
